name_en: Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release zp prototype
name_cn:
Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release zp prototype
kelly Elan Goatskin 27cm 89 Black Gold Hardware
The first true underarm bag in the kelly family; no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length. A bag with very high daily usage~
A graceful slender silhouette, black goatskin paired with black and gold exuding a full vintage vibe, perfect for storage. The strap length and underarm carry method are very nice!
